study_name (REQUIRED): Study name must not contain spaces or special characters other than underscore.
output_database_path (REQUIRED): Absolute OS Path to a geodatabase that contains output_mosaic_dataset_name.
output_mosaic_dataset_name (REQUIRED): Name of the output mosaic dataset.
input_observer_features_item_id (REQUIRED): Item ID of the input point feature layer.
input_tessellation_features_item_id (REQUIRED): Item ID of the input tessellation feature layer tied to the primary image service.
primary_image_service_item_id (REQUIRED): Item ID of the primary input elevation image service.
secondary_image_service_item_id (OPTIONAL): Item ID of the secondary input elevation image service.
retention_policy (OPTIONAL, defaults to 0): Number of prior results to retain on each run.
cluster_search_distance (OPTIONAL, defaults to '10 Kilometers'): The eps distance in DBSCAN expressed as a linear unit.
cluster_analysis_distance (OPTIONAL, defaults to '50 Kilometers'): The buffer distance around each cluster, should be larger or the same size as cluster_search_distance.
min_features_cluster (OPTIONAL, defaults to 4): The minimum points to define a cluster in DBSCAN or 'ESTIMATE_PARAMETERS' to estimate.
vs_downsample_value (OPTIONAL): How much to resample the input rasters for Viewshed2 either as a 'MULTIPLE' or 'ABSOLUTE' value.
vs_downsample_type (OPTIONAL, defaults to 'ABSOLUTE'): How to apply the vs_downsample_value.
vs_clip_raster_to_aoi (OPTIONAL, defaults to True): Clip input rasters for Viewshed2.
vs_observer_offset (OPTIONAL, defaults to '5 METERS'): A pass-through parameter (observer_offset) for Viewshed2.
vs_surface_offset (OPTIONAL, defaults to '5 METERS'): A pass-through parameter (surface_offset) for Viewshed2.
me_downsample_value (OPTIONAL): How much to resample the input rasters for MaxEnt either as a 'MULTIPLE' or 'ABSOLUTE' value.
me_downsample_type (OPTIONAL, defaults to 'ABSOLUTE'): How to apply the me_downsample_value.
me_clip_raster_to_aoi (OPTIONAL, defaults to True): Clip input rasters for MaxEnt.
me_calculate_and_analyze_slope (OPTIONAL, defaults to False): If True, extracts slope from the input elevation layer and includes it as an explanatory raster in MaxEnt.
me_explanatory_rasters (OPTIONAL, defaults to []): The item_id of hosted image services to serve as explanatory rasters in MaxEnt.
fast_dev_mode (OPTIONAL, default to False): If True, processes a few AOIs.
fast_dev_iterations (OPTIONAL, default to 1): If fast_dev_mode is True, number of AOIs to process.
gp_support_path (OPTIONAL, default to GPSupport): Sets the absolute working directory path.
